name: Bug Report

---

### Describe the Unexpected Behavior

A clear and concise description of the unexpected behavior.

### Expected Behavior

Tell us what you expected to happen.

### Screenshot & Code

Create a **simple** example showing the unexpected behavior. Do NOT paste your entire worksheet as this is hard to understand for us.

```
IMPORTANT: If you provided a screenshot, add the CalcpadCE code from the screenshot within this code block so that we can copy/paste it to reproduce the bug on our end!
```
